fields.label: Hero Title

fields.default_value: Connectivity Is Where It All Begins
fields.instructions: Main heading for the hero section

fields.label: Hero Subtitle
fields.name: cc_hero_subtitle
fields.default_value: Access to services starts with access to connectivity.

fields.label: Hero Description
fields.name: cc_hero_description
fields.default_value: Without it, systems cannot function, platforms cannot reach people, and opportunities remain out of reach. TrAC provides that foundation, building the infrastructure that enables everything else to work.

fields.label: Overview Label
fields.name: cc_overview_label
fields.instructions: Small eyebrow label above the overview heading

fields.label: Overview Title
fields.name: cc_overview_title
fields.default_value: A Stronger Network for Greater Impact
fields.instructions: Main heading for the overview section

fields.label: Overview Description
fields.name: cc_overview_description
fields.default_value:
TransAfrica Communications (TrAC) was built on a simple idea—reliable internet can empower people and businesses. Since 2012, it has grown from Rwanda into a regional provider across East Africa, delivering.

Now, in partnership with Connecting Communities Africa, TrAC is expanding its reach and impact bringing connectivity to underserved regions and enabling more communities to learn, work, and grow.
fields.instructions: Body copy for the overview section. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.
